name: Liberation Broadcasts
description: Continuous transmission of unencrypted anti-authoritarian messaging designed to incite democratic uprisings.

name: Anti-Corporate Agitprop
description: Dark web leaks of corporate corruption meant to destabilize megacorp monopolies and incite worker strikes.

name: Fear Campaign
description: Exaggerated reports of foreign military buildup broadcast across border worlds to drum up militaristic panic and xenophobia.

name: Scientific Utopianism
description: Calculated cultural exports showcasing tech miracles to demoralize traditionalist populations.

name: Nationalist Mythmaking
description: State-sponsored historical revisionism broadcast internally to solidify internal harmony and isolationism.
